A fun look at the meaning and use of "Arbeit" and its surprising family connections that lead all the way from Oliver Twist to Wall-E. effort, work, human expenditure Synonyms: Aufwand, Mühe Das ist mir zu viel Arbeit. ― This is too much effort for me.
